Employers Claim They Are WORKING
Under Normal Conditions With
Regular Number of Men

pages.raw_text:
Burt Mckay, colored strike
breaker, was attacked by four pickets


on the elevated platform at State


and Van Buren, streets at noon and
was severely beaten. His assailants


escaped. Mckay was taken to the


hospital. The assault created a panic


among the hundreds of elevated pass


engers who witnessed the affair.

from interfering with the teaming

master in chancery.

would be violation of their consti-
tutional rights not to incriminate
themselves.
